title: tillandsia aurea var. aurea
intro: Tillandsia aurea var. aurea is a species of epiphytic bromeliad, a type of plant that grows on other surfaces such as trees without harming them. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Tillandsia aurea var. aurea are said to include reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and enhanced immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made by infusing the leaves in water or using them in teas, and are used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
